title: Scenario thinking
html: Stub. Yahir's frame for "anticipate the future through scenarios — different perspective and angles" — first explicitly stated in 2019 06 25 anticipate the future through scenarios at age 17. The frame matures into regret minimization (Bezos) and memento mori filtering. Sits as the proto-concept that the later, named decision filters refine. Compare with anticipate future scenarios if a parallel page surfaces.
